items.title: Add dedicated tag pages
items.description: Create /dev/tags/[tag] pages that list all entries for a tag with SEO-friendly metadata.

items.title: Add RSS feed for new entries
items.description: Expose /dev/feed.xml so readers can subscribe to daily Dev Lab updates.

items.title: Add copy-to-clipboard for code blocks
items.description: Improve DX by letting readers copy snippets from entry pages in one click.

items.title: Refactor entry page layout components
items.description: Extract shared header/meta components to reduce duplication between index and detail pages.

items.title: Document pipeline architecture in README
items.description: Add a section explaining backlog rotation, validation, and commit strategy.
